attacks.name: Zzzap
attacks.text: Does 20 damage to each Pokemon that has any Poke-Powers or Poke-Bodies (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Metallic Thunder
attacks.text: You may discard 2 Metal Energy attached to Raichu. If you do, this attack's base damage is 100 instead of 50.

tests.name: zzzap_hits_power_pokemon
tests.description: Test that Zzzap deals 20 to each Pokemon with Poke-Power or Poke-Body

tests.name: zzzap_hits_own_pokemon
tests.description: Test that Zzzap also damages your own Pokemon with abilities

tests.name: metallic_thunder_bonus
tests.description: Test that Metallic Thunder does 100 when discarding 2 Metal Energy
